items.definition_en: A sim card is a small chip which stores data and allows a phone to connect to a network.
items.example_en: I replaced my sim card after switching phone providers.

items.definition_en: Voicemail is an audio message recorded when a caller cannot reach you.
items.example_en: She left me a voicemail after I missed her call.

items.definition_en: A smartphone is a mobile phone that can use the internet and run apps.
items.example_en: I check my email every morning on my smartphone.

items.definition_en: A landline is a telephone that is connected by wires to a network.
items.example_en: My grandparents still use a landline at home.

items.definition_en: A text message is a written message sent electronically between phones.
items.example_en: He sent me a text message to confirm our meeting time.

items.definition_en: Roaming allows you to use your phone outside your usual area or country.
items.example_en: Data roaming is expensive when traveling abroad.

items.definition_en: A prepaid card lets you pay in advance for phone services.
items.example_en: I bought a prepaid card for my trip to Spain.

items.definition_en: A headset is a device with headphones and a microphone for calls.
items.example_en: She wears a headset to answer calls at work.

items.definition_en: An extension is a shorter phone number within a larger system, such as an office.
items.example_en: To reach John, dial his extension after the main number.

items.definition_en: A conference call is a phone call involving several people at different locations.
items.example_en: We have a conference call with the team at 10 a.m.

items.definition_en: Hands-free is a device allowing you to use the phone without holding it.
items.example_en: Using a hands-free is safer while driving.

items.definition_en: Texting is the act of sending written messages by phone.
items.example_en: Texting is her favorite way to keep in touch.

items.definition_en: Caller id shows the phone number of the person calling you.
items.example_en: Thanks to caller id, I knew who was ringing.

items.definition_en: A data plan is a phone contract that sets how much internet you can use.
items.example_en: I upgraded my data plan to watch videos on my phone.

items.definition_en: A hotspot is a place where you can connect to the internet wirelessly.
items.example_en: He found a free hotspot at the station to check his emails.

items.definition_en: A text alert is a warning message sent by phone.
items.example_en: I received a text alert about the weather.

items.definition_en: A contact list is a saved collection of names and numbers in your phone.
items.example_en: I added her phone number to my contact list.

items.definition_en: A call log is the record of phone calls you have made or received.
items.example_en: Check your call log if you miss a phone call.

items.definition_en: Call forwarding sends your phone calls to another number.
items.example_en: He used call forwarding when out of the office.

items.definition_en: Speed dial is a feature that lets you call a favorite number quickly.
items.example_en: I put my mom’s number on speed dial.
